name: Gajeel (Edolas)
description: The Edolas Gajeel is a free writer. He is well-known for his articles criticizing authorities, thus his reputation is far from being good. In fact, he is nearly hated.  Gajeel is quick-witted and excellent at gathering information. He usually wears a black suit, a white shirt and a tie. His permanent accessory is a black hat with a metal strip. He also has ear piercings.  His peculiar difference is wavy hair, while Gajeel Redfox wears his hair in spikes.
